programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: When Michelle and Dev investigate the suspicious death of a CSIS agent, the IIB uncovers a breach of classified intelligence.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: A routine trip to the hospital leads a wealthy businessman to lose his baby daughter after his SUV is hijacked.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: A break in a six-month cyber crime investigation leads Michelle and Dev to pursue a reckless hacker.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: Toby and Oz are taken hostage by two men posing as security guards when they are dispatched to a routine call in the financial district.

programme.title: The Listener
programme.desc: A celebrated restaurant chef is a star witness in the trial of a mob boss charged with shooting his business partner.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: In Malaysia, MacGyver and the team extract a terrorist group's money man who has intel on an impending attack, but when the man is shot, MacGyver must keep him alive in order to learn the terrorists' plans.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: Mac and Jack work with a Russian bomb programmer and his alienated handler to defuse a Soviet-era warhead in Moscow; when the antiquated computer breaks down, Mac must find a way to fix it.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver must fix a sabotaged train to protect a woman who has proof that her boss is selling weapons to enemies of the U.S.

programme.title: MacGyver
programme.desc: MacGyver must diffuse a bomb planted near the United Nations by his old adversary, the Ghost, then track the criminal down.

programme.title: Stolen
programme.desc: A former thief frantically searches for his missing daughter, who has been kidnapped and locked in the trunk of a taxi. Starring Nicolas Cage and Malin Akerman.

programme.title: My Baby Gone
programme.desc: Pregnant Emily bonds quickly with her pregnant neighbor Kelly, but Kelly is faking it and plans to steal Emily's baby.

programme.title: On the Edge
programme.desc: When a young basketball player becomes entangled with drug dealers, he turns to an ex-cop and former private eye. Starring Ice-T, Gary Busey, Fred Williamson and Jim Brown.

programme.title: Trespass
programme.desc: Fast-talking diamond dealer Kyle Miller (Nicolas Cage) and his wife, Sarah (Nicole Kidman), live the good life in a beautiful home surrounded by thick woods. Their dream life turns into a nightmare when violent thieves, led by Elias (Ben Mendelsohn), invade their home disguised as police officers. With Kyle and Sarah now frightened captives, Kyle knows he must use every negotiating trick in his book, for once Elias and his men get what they want, the Millers will likely be killed.

programme.title: Eye See You
programme.desc: Recovering from the psychological effects of witnessing a brutal crime, FBI Agent Jake Malloy (Sylvester Stallone) checks into a rehabilitation clinic for law enforcement officers in the remote wilderness of Wyoming during the dead of winter. He soon finds himself helping other patients as a serial killer begins killing them one by one.

programme.title: Monty Python's Life of Brian
programme.desc: Born on the original Christmas in the stable next door to Jesus Christ.

programme.title: Take Me Home Tonight
programme.desc: Four years after graduation, an awkward high school genius uses his sister's boyfriend's Labor Day party

programme.title: Georgia Rule
programme.desc: A troubled young woman is sent to live with her grandmother for the summer, while hiding a secret that could potentially tear her family apart.

programme.title: Paper Man
programme.desc: A washed-up writer forms an unlikely friendship with a teenager from Long Island.

programme.title: Final Run
programme.desc: A new, computer controlled train loses control due to an error in the system and speeds out of control while Urich attempts to stop it.

programme.title: Blue Thunder
programme.desc: A tough but straight-arrow cop battles a group of military and government elitists who have developed an extraordinary helicopter into the ultimate weapon. Edited for TV.

programme.title: The Take
programme.desc: After he's shot during a heist in East L.A., an armored-truck driver (Leguizamo) wrestles with rehabilitation and tracking down the man (Gibson) who committed the crime.

programme.title: Felon
programme.desc: A suburban family man is convicted of manslaughter and sent to prison, where he becomes caught up in the vicious cycle of corruption and violence.

programme.title: Our Man In Havana
programme.desc: A vacuum cleaner salesman is recruited by the British secret service to act as a spy in Havana.

programme.title: Duffy
programme.desc: Duffy is a cunning aristocrat of criminals who is hired by Stefane, a young playboy, to hijack a boat carrying several million dollars of his father's fortune. The plot succeeds, with a little help from Segolene, Stefane's girlfriend - but also with an unexpected, sudden turn of events.

programme.title: Passport To Suez
programme.desc: This time the Lone Wolf heads for Egypt. William goes undercover to break up a Nazi scheme to steal British plans for the Suez Canal. A good amount of gunplay and chase scenes--including an outstanding chase in airplanes.

programme.title: Let's Do It Again
programme.desc: A couple faces divorce after a wife's plan to teach her unfaithful husband a lesson backfires.

programme.title: The Boys From Brazil
programme.desc: A Nazi hunter in Paraguay discovers a sinister and bizarre plot to rekindle the Third Reich.

programme.title: The Road To Wellville
programme.desc: Presiding over the renowned Battle Creek Sanitarium is the visionary cornflake inventor and health-craze huckster Dr. John Harvey Kellogg (Hopkins). Seeking to improve their health – and their marriage – are Eleanor (Fonda), Kellogg's spellbound devotee, and Will (Broderick), her reluctant but devoted husband. What doesn't kill them in this spa/hospital/grand hotel will only make them stronger as they make their way through an obstacle course of sexual temptations, mechanical contraptions and dietary breakthroughs. Filled with outrageous methodology and hilarious hijinks, this "sumptuously photographed turn-of-the-century comedy with a fine cast" (San Francisco Chronicle) will make you double over ... with laughter!

programme.title: Welcome Home, Roxy Carmichael
programme.desc: A small town prepares for the homecoming of superstar Roxy Carmichael, as does a young outsider, who believes Roxy is her mother.

programme.title: Magic
programme.desc: Anthony Hopkins and Ann-Margret star in this thriller about a ventriloquist whose dummy seems to have a mind of its own.

programme.title: Sliding Doors
programme.desc: The split-second moments that can take a life down one path instead of another form the tantalizing "what if?" in this delightful romantic comedy starring Gwyneth Paltrow.

programme.title: Ender's Game
programme.desc: After an alien invasion, an unlikely recruit commands Earth's forces and fights for the future of humanity.

programme.title: Kin
programme.desc: An ex-con and his adopted brother go on the run with a weapon of mysterious origin as their only protection.

programme.title: Push
programme.desc: Two kids with special abilities must find a girl in Hong Kong before a shadowy government organization does.

programme.title: Nerve
programme.desc: Partnered with a sly competitor, a high schooler plays an online game of dare that takes a sinister turn.

programme.title: The Giver
programme.desc: In a seemingly perfect community, a boy is chosen to learn about the pain and pleasure of the "real" world.

programme.title: Karma: Death at Latigo Springs
programme.desc: Charley Stevens moves to the town where her recently deceased mother grew up; after arriving, she is plagued with strange nightmares that tease a horrific event, hinting at why her mother left town.

programme.title: The Wide West
programme.desc: 1907. A mysterious gambler aids a couple of Japanese sumo wrestlers, the local Judge and a beautiful store owner against ruthless outlaws who have attacked a small Californian town.

programme.title: Space Ranger
programme.desc: The Space Ranger program, set up to protect humans from intergalactic threats in the future, is opened back up when a new threat arrives on Earth, threatening to destroy humanity once and for all.

programme.title: A Witness to Murder
programme.desc: Sanitation worker MaryBeth is in the wrong place at the wrong time when the mayor's wife is murdered. She refuses to talk to the sheriff she dislikes, but the killers know she was there. Now they're coming for her to make sure she stays silent.

programme.title: Lone Star Shark 2
programme.desc: A new victim has been chosen to face off against a ravenous shark in a Texas lake.

programme.title: The Golden Cane Warrior
programme.desc: When an aging martial arts master chooses two of her meeker students to be her successors, two older students steal her mystical cane and pursue their rivals.

programme.title: The Bodyguard
programme.desc: A retired bodyguard in the early stages of dementia befriends a young girl. When her father's criminal connections place her in danger, the bodyguard calls upon forgotten skills to keep her safe.

programme.title: Eye for an Eye
programme.desc: A highly trained and exceptionally deadly swordsman looks for revenge after being caught in the middle of a power struggle that results in the assassination of an innocent woman's family.

programme.title: Master Z: Ip Man Legacy
programme.desc: Defeated by Master Ip, martial arts expert Cheung Tin Chi tries to lead a normal life in Hong Kong until triad leaders draw him back into fighting.

programme.title: Fatal Performance
programme.desc: A struggling actress is hired to impersonate a woman for a business meeting, but soon finds her life in danger.

programme.title: Courage
programme.desc: Jason Priestley stars in this inspirational adventure story about courage, love and the power of family.

programme.title: The Wedding Rule
programme.desc: Gemma and Max, former childhood friends are bequeathed a restaurant but must pretend to be married.

programme.title: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: A cop-turned-writer creates suspicion when she publishes her first novel.

programme.title: A Town Called Love
programme.desc: After clashing with the mayor of Love's son Riley, she impersonates her boss to teach him a lesson.

programme.title: Edison
programme.desc: Ambitious young reporter Pollack (Justin Timberlake) suspects insidious corruption in his town's elite police unit, known as F.R.A.T., and finds a friendly source in Deed (LL Cool J), a dissatisfied member of the squad. With Deed's information and the backing of his publisher, Ashford (Morgan Freeman), and a crusading lawyer, Wallace (Kevin Spacey), Pollack infiltrates the secretive police cabal. He finds himself in over his head, however, when he discovers the true extent of the criminality.

programme.title: Rule of Thirds
programme.desc: Monte Ashcroft, a world-class editorial photographer, finds love in a new muse-until a secret threatens to unravel everything.

programme.title: Nico
programme.desc: After a teenage boy is brutally murdered, Detective Carrera defies orders to pursue the truth. As corruption within the police force is exposed, the investigation spirals into a deadly confrontation that will reshape the city and Nico's legacy.

programme.title: The Recall
programme.desc: When five friends vacation at a remote lake house they expect nothing less than a good time, unaware that planet Earth is under an alien invasion and mass-abduction.

programme.title: Gun
programme.desc: Rich is the police's prime target against the war on gun runners. When an exchange goes bad, paranoia ensues, causing rifts among Rich and his team.

programme.title: Complexx: The Two Exes
programme.desc: Dane is in a constant battle with love and lust. Haunted by both his dead sister and his mother, he fights his torment while being pursued by two ex-girlfriends. When the two women end up moving into his building, they begin a war of manipulation, on top of a masked killer running through the building. Who will make it out alive?

programme.title: The Lineup
programme.desc: Sebastian “Bas” Monte is an up-and-coming influencer and club promoter. He doesn’t have the time to commit to only one woman, so he schedules out different women for his needs. That is until he meets Mikayla, and he questions his playboy ways.

programme.title: Shuttered Secrets
programme.desc: When Trey’s ex-girlfriend, Jada, unexpectedly shows up to his studio, she accuses him of dark secrets and being involved in a missing persons case. Their reunion quickly spirals into psychological warfare and violence. As the night goes on, the line between predator and victim blurs when other mysterious figures arrive and everything must be questioned.

programme.title: Rhythm and Revenge
programme.desc: After losing her parents, Journi, a talented but troubled teenager, moves in with her aunt and cousin for a fresh start. As she navigates the pressures of competitive dance, strange accidents begin to occur around her. Suspicion grows, but Journi always seems one step ahead, charming her way out of trouble. However, when the truth starts to unravel, danger lurks closer than anyone could have imagined.

programme.title: He Killed My Sister
programme.desc: When Malorie's sister, Monica, disappears, everyone around her tells her to grieve and move on. Determined to bring her justice, Malorie embarks on a search for the truth. But when she meets Tyriq, his motives may not be as pure as they seem.

programme.title: 3-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: Nature's greatest killing machine is three times as deadly when a mutated shark threatens a cruise ship.

programme.title: AVH: Alien vs. Hunter
programme.desc: A galactic hunter chases the most dangerous alien in the galaxy to Earth. Humans are caught in the crossfire.

programme.title: 5-Headed Shark Attack
programme.desc: A monster 5-Headed Shark terrorizes the beaches of Puerto Rico, endangering the once peaceful island paradise.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Avengers Grimm: Time Wars
programme.desc: When Rumpelstiltskin tries to take over Earth, The Avengers Grimm must track him through time to defeat him.

programme.title: Conquest -
programme.desc: A young man, armed with a magical bow and arrows, embarks on a mystical journey through a mystical land to rid it of all evil and joins forces with an outlaw to take down an evil witch bent on claiming the magic bow for evil.

programme.title: 400 Days
programme.desc: Four astronauts Captain Theo Cooper, Dr. Emily McTier, Bug Kieslowski, and Cole Dvorak are sent on a simulated mission to a distant planet to test the psychological effects of deep space travel. Locked away for 400 days, the crew's mental state begins to deteriorate when they lose all communication with the outside world. Forced to exit the ship, they wonder if the mission is a simulation after all.

programme.title: Itsy Bitsy
programme.desc: A story tangled up in a web of family drama, personal demons, and a horrifying monster.Based on the centuries-old poem, a family moves into a secluded mansion where they soon find themselves being targeted by an ancient entity taking the form of a giant spider.Kara, a private nurse and single mother, moves from the big city to the quiet countryside with her two children, 13-year-old Jesse and 8-year-old Cambria, to live with and take care of an elderly man with multiple sclerosis. Things seem normal enough until Jesse discovers a mysterious old relic in the old man's house, leading to unexpected and horrifying things coming to life.

programme.title: Mermaid Down
programme.desc: A mermaid is ripped from the Pacific, her tail is chopped off and she's thrown into a mental home where no one believes she is a mermaid.

programme.title: The Found Footage Phenomenon
programme.desc: A documentary tracking the history of the untold story of the global sensation; found footage.

programme.title: Can't Take It Back
programme.desc: A vengeful spirit goes after two girls who posted mean comments on her Facebook page.

programme.title: Shook
programme.desc: When Mia, a social media star, becomes the target of an online terror campaign, she's forced to solve a series of games to prevent people she cares about from getting murdered. But is it real? Or is it just a game at her expense?

programme.title: Crowsnest
programme.desc: Five young friends on a road trip are terrorized by nomadic cannibals in a huge RV. The video they recorded is discovered by police as evidence in their still-unsolved murders.

programme.title: Confessional
programme.desc: After two deaths at a college on the same night, seven students are invited to a confessional booth hidden on campus.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Needs a Maw" - Mr. Drysdale needs investors for his real estate development project, so he enlists the Widow Fenwick, and aims to cement the deal by hitching her to Jed Clampett, who is looking to find a mother for his daughter, Elly May.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Turkey Day" - Elly bonds with the Thanksgiving turkey so the family can't bring themselves to kill it; Mrs Drysdale hires some Indians to take a Thanksgiving picture, which puts Granny on the warpath.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Clampetts Are Overdrawn" - The Clampetts receive an overdraft from the bank intended for the deadbeat actor J.D. 'Jake' Clampett, while he gets their statement and starts to spend their money.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jethro's First Love" - Jethro decides that he wants to go a-courtin', so after Uncle Jed gives him a little education, he finds himself a woman--who happens to be a stripper. As usual, neither she or the Clampetts actually understand what the other is really saying.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Elly Starts to School" - Mrs. Drysdale recommends Elly for a high-brow finishing school in hopes that humiliating her will drive the Clampetts away; but instead Miss Hathaway convinces the girls at the school that Elly is a fashion trend-setter. Elly invites the filthy rich Fenwicks over, thinking they're destitute.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Hair-Raising Holiday" - After Granny cuts off the top of Drysdale and Clyburn's (his doctor) hair for some homegrown remedy, Clyburn tries to keep her from ever doctoring again. Meanwhile, the Clampetts are looking forward to the Possum Day parade, which of course isn't celebrated in Beverly Hills, so Drysdale has to figure out how to have one to keep them happy.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Pays His Income Tax" - When an IRS agent gets chased away by Granny, Mr. Drysdale tells him the story of how the Clampetts came to be rich and move to Beverly Hills.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Granny's Spring Tonic" - Miss Hathaway's brilliant-but-frumpy bank protegee Gloria is really a sultry gold-digger with eyes for Jed's $34 million, and Jed's just had his annual dose of Granny's spring tonic.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Cuts the Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale continues to be forced into doing "practices from the past" by Mrs. Smith-Standish, who discovers that Jed's family is possibly the first to come the country. If so they'd be famous worldwide, but does Jed want that?

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "The Family Tree" - Mrs. Drysdale wants to get rid of the Clampetts before the arrival of Mrs. Smith-Standish, the head of a 'first family' historical society. But Mrs. Smith-Standish goes to the Clampetts' first and becomes enchanted with their antiques and way of life, even to roping the horrified Mrs. Drysdale into helping do the chores the old-fashioned way.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies
programme.desc: "Jed Becomes a Banker" - Drysdale hires Jed to be a banker when he needs a crack shot to help beat a rival banker in a skeet shooting competition, but his partner needs to be an employee.

programme.title: The Beverly Hillbillies

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes the legendary Toyota Supra to The Smallest Cog! Ft. @Jimmy_Broadbent

programme.title: Richard Hammond Drives the New BMW M5 Touring - And He's NOT a Fan
programme.desc: This is the first BMW M5 Richard Hammond has driven since our beloved V10 E61 M5 Touring, so does the 700+bhp hybrid super estate live up to the hype?

programme.title: Ferrari SF90 driven by Ex-Stig flat-out!
programme.desc: Believe it or not, Ben Collins – the old Stig – never got to drive a LaFerrari. So when we were thrown the keys to the brand new Ferrari SF90, we took it to Thruxton race track for the dayand handed it over to Ben. So... Does he like the electrification of the Italian brand?

programme.title: Richard Hammond brings an E46 BMW M3 to the Smallest Cog! Ft. @MatArmstrongbmx
programme.desc: We all love a future classic, and it doesn't get much better than the stunning BMW E46 M3. In this new series that we're kicking off, we invited YouTuber Mat Armstrong to the Smallest Cog to have his car checked over by Mike and Anthony, and have a chat with Richard. Here's how it went!

programme.title: How is Richard Hammond's classic car business doing after 2 years?
programme.desc: With 2023 coming to a close, Mike Fernie grabs Chief Cog Neil Greenhouse for a walkaround of Richard Hammond's workshop to discuss the cars inside and how the business is doing after its second year in business.

programme.title: Why Isn’t There A 7-Cylinder Engine?
programme.desc: We have single cylinder engines, twins, triples, four-pots, inline fives, straight-sixes, but then we start to skip some steps. We jump to V8s, V10s and V12s, even V- or W16s. It’s a question many of you probably have never even thought to ask, but now that you’ve clicked on this video, let’s talk about it – why is there no such thing as a 7-cylinder engine?

programme.title: Why are V10 engines completely gone from modern cars?
programme.desc: The V10 engine is all but gone from the car industry, but with the V8 and V12 still going strong, why has the V10 died? Mike Fernie takes the DriveTribe M5 Touring for a spin to investigate this mystery.

programme.title: Richard Hammond commutes to work in our new 700hp Dodge Charger Hellcat!
programme.desc: With the DriveTribe Dodge Charger Hellcat settling in nicely with our team, Mike decided the boss deserved a go. Richard Hammond thought it would be fitting to use the 707hp supercharged animal to commute from his house to the Smallest Cog, because who wouldn't want to drive to work in a 6.2-litre hemi-powered monster?

programme.title: Richard Hammond has bought a seriously UNEXPECTED daily driver!
programme.desc: Nevermind a brand new supercar, it turns out Richard Hammond loves a van. And to help all the processes involved in running a classic car restoration workshop, Richard has bought the team a new Ford Transit, the quintessential piece of kit for such a job.

programme.title: What Makes this ‘Bugatti’ so Cheap?!
programme.desc: The Bugatti Veyron is one of the all-time great cars, but you get one, you're talking at least £1 million. So what if you could buy a car that looks identical to a Veyron, but it was 'only' £150,000? What makes this 'Bugatti' so cheap? Well it's fake! This fake Bugatti has an engine from an Audi RS6, a bespoke steel tube chassis, but a real Veyron windscreen! Is it worth it?!

programme.title: Richard Hammond welcomes a truly ICONIC car to his workshop!
programme.desc: We’re back with another Cog Score video, where Richard Hammond interviews a special guest whilst their car is put under scrutiny by Mike Fernie and Anthony Greenhouse from Richard Hammond's Workshop. This episode features the one and only AutoAlex (Alex Kersten) and his world-famous Mazda MX-5, Phil! While Alex Kersten is chatting with Richard Hammond upstairs, Mike and Anthony get the Miata MX5 up on the ramp to see how the car is holding up!

programme.title: Inside the Ex-Stig's MASSIVE private farm compound!
programme.desc: Join us for an exclusive look around the former Top Gear Stig's new Farm. Has Clarkson's Farm got some competition from the Ex Stig? Mike Fernie joins him for the day looking around and getting stuck in with a bit of work!

programme.title: Richard Hammond Has Bought ANOTHER Car!
programme.desc: Oliver the Opel Kadett is arguably the most famous Top Gear car ever and has been a staple of Richard Hammond’s garage for years. In a new twist to his story, Richard Hammond has purchased another car, another Opel, classed as Oliver’s girlfriend. Say hello to Olivia!

programme.title: Transforming Richard Hammond's Subaru from The Grand Tour! | Project Martin Ep.1
programme.desc: Mike originally rescued the Subaru from a secret Grand Tour location, and now is the time to start bringing Richard's STI V-Limited back to its former best. First mission – getting the Martini wrap off!

programme.title: Was Clarkson Right About The Original Tesla Roadster?
programme.desc: The Tesla Roadster was the original Tesla, the start of Elon Musk's world-beating automotive company. But does it still stack up 15 years on? Was Jeremy Clarkson right in his original controversial review? Mike Fernie goes out in a £150,000 example to find out!

programme.title: This ILLEGAL fluid could increase engine power by 100bhp!
programme.desc: Graphene nanofluids are currently being created by a company called Flexegraph, with the aim being to transform the efficiency of regular car coolant. With this pioneering technology currently being banned by the FIA, how long will it be before these game-changing fluids make it into the automotive world?

programme.title: £4000 MANUAL XKR Inspected By Jaguar!

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Its the second day, and the top 16 athletes have made it through to the final round. With another 4 events to go who will get the crown of world champion?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: Welcome to Ukraine and the wonderful capital city of Kyiv. Were here for the second time for the iconic truck pull World Championships! The reigning World champion Kelvin de Ruiter from Holland will defend his title.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: In this episode, a final chance for our athletes to get vital world series ranking points on board to give them the best possible chance of success and an initial advantage at the finals. It's the last show before the world finals and the top 10 places are up for grabs, but who will they be?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are in Alanya, on Turkeys south-coast for the final stop at the end of a mammoth season. Here in the sunshine, well finally crown our world champion and what a place Alanya is - you could not ask for a better setting. Aivars Smaukstellis, the reigning world champion is defending his title, and two-time world champion Dainis Zageris is also here, but with a though competition, who will win?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: What a day ahead of us here in Alanya, just a handful of events to go before we find out who will be the winner of Strongman Champions League in 2021. These are the world finals, and all the big names are in the house. With just 3 events to go - who will take the crown of World Champion 2021 and be the STRONGEST?

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are back, after a short break it feels like we never even left. We’re here in Vaasa - Finland kicking off 2022 new world series. If you are watching at home, just like these people, you’re in the right place. Because this is a special edition world record breaker. The only question left today, is to see how many new world records will be set so stay tuned.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: We are here in Doetinchem – Holland, for Stage 2 and 3 in the hottest day of the year. 40-degree heat, these boys have to work harder than they ever have. The sun is going to be beating down, they’re going to be sweating, hydration is going to be key today. I also reckon they’re all going to be wearing their sunglasses. Let’s see which shady looking character wins.

programme.title: Strongman Champions League
programme.desc: So there you have it. The next day, 3 more events in 40 Degrees heat. We’ve got Gavin coming into day 2 leading the pack. Kelvin De Ruiter our world champion struggling a little bit at the moment, but Yoke Race, Conan’s Wheel and then Stones to finish. There is a lot to be played for here, so stay tuned to see if Gavin can take the lead and beat Kelvin overall.

programme.title: Man With a Plan
programme.desc: Adam has been operating under the assumption that his three children are little angels, but when his wife decides to rejoin the workforce after being a stay-at-home mom for 13 years, and he starts taking on more of the parenting responsibilities, he's quickly disavowed of that notion. Kate, a preteen, is a master manipulator and excited to take advantage of her father's naivete; Teddy spends too much time with his hands down his pants; and Emme frets over school. After recovering from the initial shock -- and with the advice of equally stressed parents Marie and Lowell -- Adam is confident he can lay down the law and keep the house in order.

programme.title: The Dave Chang Cooking Show
programme.desc: "Preparing for Tyler Huggins" - This week’s guest, Tyler Huggins (founder and CEO of Meati), is on his way in to the studio. Dave’s not feeling confident, but he starts prepping for the meal anyway.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Oyakodon & Mortadella Sandwich: Chris Ying cooks a Japanese dish called Oyakodon that he made for his buddy David Chang on a recent episode of Dinner Time Live. Oyakodon translates to “parent and child bowl” and refers to the main ingredients: chicken (the parent) and egg (the child). Chicken thighs and sliced onions are simmered in seasoned dashi, then covered in egg, which forms a custard-y blanket to be served over rice. Chris and Andrew make a Dinner Time Live recipe based on one of David Chang's favorite sandwiches in the world: a cheesy, hot, mortadella sandwich. This version has a twist—a Chinese steamed bun as a tribute to Momofuku's famous pork buns.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes - Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad, Spicy Seafood Boil, Ramen Rockefeller: Andrew makes the refreshing Lobster, Corn & Melon Salad from the Summer Menu episode of Dinner Time Live; Chris and Andrew make the Spicy-Tingly Seafood Boil and Ramen Rockefeller from the Epic Combos episode.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes
programme.desc: Dinner Time Live: The Recipe - XO Fries & Crispy Shrimp Rolls - Chris and Andrew make two more recipes from Dinner Time Live with David Chang: XO Fries and Crispy Shrimp Rolls. The XO Fries start with a bed of golden French Fries, then topped with a pile of Chinese BBQ pork and covered with a savory, slightly spicy XO sauce (made from dried seafood, ham, shallots and chili oil). The Crispy Shrimp Rolls are inspired by the famous crispy shrimp tacos from Mariscos Jalisco—a legendary food truck in LA.

programme.title: Dinner Time Live: The Recipes

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: How about upping your grill game with steaks you may not be familiar with, such as secreto or spinalis dorsi? Secreto is a hyper-flavorful steak cut from a hog’s belly with a grilled vegetable sauce, romesco. Spinalis dorsi the most delectable part of a rib roast reborn as a steak, and grilled with bourbon. And grill a brisket steak fragrant with sizzling shallot sage butter.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: In today’s show, Texas barbecue meets Mexican spice as we explore how American barbecue techniques can enhance three classic Mexican dishes: snapper in pipian in a grilled vegetable and pumpkin seed sauce, pork shoulder pibil smoke-roasted in banana leaves, and a Project Fire first, a dessert quesadilla lavished with bananas and dulce de leche.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Looking back to when our ancestors grilled in the fireplace, on stones around the campfire and directly on the embers, Primal Grilling will make you a barbecue rock star. Try ember-grilled bread roasted vegetable salad, chicken hanging in midair over a smoky fire, and amaretti-stuffed pears grilled on primordial slabs of salt, grilling techniques as old as humankind itself.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Most barbecue enthusiasts can name the big three of barbecue: Kansas City ribs, Carolina pulled pork, and Texas smoked brisket. But what about some of the lesser-known styles? Cornell chicken was created by a Cornell University poultry scientist and today served in upstate New York. Up in Anchorage, Alaska, we have sweet yet smokey barbecued salmon.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Everyone knows that a good barbecue makes the perfect prelude to the game. In this show, we explore how my home state of Florida reimagines three tailgate classics. Get ready for pork shooters stuffed with shrimp, cheese and sausage, wings blasted with fire water, and smoky hamburgers like you’ve never experienced. The secret? Lace them with chopped barbecued brisket.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: The pork shoulder, aka Boston butt, gives us Carolina pulled pork. The majestic beef shoulder (yes, there is such a cut) becomes a Texas barbecued beef clod. As for lamb shoulder, Moroccans cook it in a fire-heated underground clay oven to make their legendary mechoui. This show explores the richest, meatiest, most flavorful cut you find in the meat department: the shoulder.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Brisket is simultaneously the easiest and hardest meat to barbecue. Today’s show is all about brisket, complete with failproof methods for smoking it right every time. From not so traditional Texas barbecue and a distinctive bacon-smoked brisket flat to an electrifying Vietnamese brisket salad. You’ll even learn how to make breakfast-worthy Tex-Mex brisket tacos.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Fire
programme.desc: Delivering both heat and taste, wood smoke contains more than a thousand flavor-producing compounds. From wood-grilled bruschetta with fire-blistered tomatoes to swordfish with raisin chimichurri and magisterial sear and slide beef tomahawks, today’s show brings you the primal campfire pleasure of grilling over a wood fire.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show elevates smoking from the tailgating lot to the penthouse! Learn to make these gourmet goodies: mesquite- smoked oysters with chipotle barbecue sauce; 7-bone prime rib smoked on a wood-burning rotisserie and seared over a blazing oak log fire; triple smoked potatoes stuffed with bacon and smoked cheddar cheese; and smoked cheesecake with burnt sugar cream sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: This show focuses on foods you never dreamed you could smoke—and won't be able to live without once you've tried them. Learn to make smoked deviled eggs; Camembert cheese smoked on a cedar plank with pepper jelly and jalapeños; Hay-smoked, reverse-seared steaks served with charred chipotle salsa; and a smoky twist on a classic cocktail—the smoky Mary.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Tailgating gets a lot more interesting when you fire up your smoker! Learn to cook game-changers like smoked chicken nachos; spicy smokehouse wings with Thai Sriracha hot sauce; and smoked bratwurst topped with smoked sauerkraut. Plus, check out a new twist on a tailgate favorite—hickory-smoked burgers with a smoked beer and cheese sauce.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Learn to make iconic smoked seafood dishes from around the world: salt-cured, cold-smoked salmon in the style of Bornholm, Denmark; hot smoked black cod (aka sablefish) cured with a fennel-coriander rub; and double-marinated wahoo from the Florida Keys with a mango-scotch bonnet salsa. Plus, find out how to make coconut crème brulees smoked in a pellet grill.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Don't wait until Thanksgiving to try these new twists on holiday favorites: whiskey-brined turkey smoked over maple wood; bacon-stuffed barbecued onions; smoky creamed corn; fiery jalapeno cranberry salsa; and a smoky bacon-apple crisp for dessert. No oven required! These recipes call for a ceramic smoker, upright barrel smoker, electric smoker, and stovetop smoker.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: Go hog wild with this pork-themed episode! Learn to use a wood-burning rotisserie to make a coffee-crusted whole pork loin with redeye barbecue sauce. Then find out how to make herbed pork shoulder with peppery West Virginia mustard sauce. Plus, find out how to cure and hickory-smoke a spectacular shoulder ham and get the scoop on how to make barbecued cabbage with smoked cheese and chorizo.

programme.title: Steven Raichlen's Project Smoke
programme.desc: It's Bacon Mania on Project Smoke! Learn to make bacon from scratch at home and a new twist on Canadian bacon: pork loin in fennel brine smoked in a ceramic cooker. Then check out the "Tulsa Torpedo", a spectacular three pounds of porky goodness encased in a crispy bacon weave. Plus, bacon surf and turf in the form of bacon-wrapped Snow Crab Poppers.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Host Tacuma Bradley explores Atlanta's vibrant landscape while following the six degrees of separation between the people he meets, including musicians, Kristian and Brandon Bush, Ruby Velle and the Soulphonics, Killer Mike, and Big Boi.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Music Voyager takes us to Peru's Paracas National Reserve that protects both white sand deserts and marine ecosystems, including the Nazca lines. Also, explore the origins of Afro-Peruvian music and trek across the Peruvian Galapagos.

programme.title: Music Voyager
programme.desc: Atlanta is a melting pot for creativity. First, we meet with Chef Nhan Le, Skip Engelbrecht, George Long, and Nicolette Valdespino. Then, we experience an improvisational performance before Music Producer KP introduces us to artist Kap G.

programme.title: Ottolenghi's Mediterranean Feast
programme.desc: Ottolenghi's Tunisian experience begins in an unusual open-air restaurant that shines a light on the region's extremely fresh seafood and continues at a popular seaside cafe. Tunisia is also a melting pot of many cultures, as you will see.

programme.title: Food Relay
programme.desc: Cuba is a land frozen in time. Paige begins her journey in vibrant Havana where she learns from talented local chefs before traveling to the coast where she examines the forces of agriculture that have formed the island's identity.

programme.title: Jeremy Pang's Asian Kitchen
programme.desc: The dishes Jeremy showcases are perfect for the family, beginning with a Malaysian Chicken Curry. Joe Swash focuses on Vegan Pad Thai. At the barbecue, Jeremy cooks up Korean BBQ Beef and Banchan, and for dessert, a Macha Mille Crepe Cake.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Ever on a quest to learn more about food, Rick even vacations with a food-oriented agenda. Join him in the mountains of Finca Las Nieves, with its artisanal coffee production and organic gardens, and learn about sustainable gardening.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Have you ever seen a kid in a candy store? Their excitement pales next to a chef in a market. Take an exhilarating morning trek to the Central de Abastos, among the world's largest markets, with Rick Bayless and Chef Eduardo "Lalo" Garcia.

programme.title: Mexico One Plate at a Time with Rick Bayless
programme.desc: Chefs can get excited over the littlest thing. For Josefina Santacruz, that one thing is beans. For savory, flavorful examples of beans done right, Rick and Josefina head to Nico's Restaurant, Hidalguense restaurant, and Yuban restaurant.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: In Messinia, Diane visits with a good friend who helps her discover the secrets of this rich, giving land that is blessed with a perfect climate. The region is home to the world's first system of culinary provenance, and delicious recipes.

programme.title: My Greek Table with Diane Kochilas
programme.desc: Diane sets out for Paros to find a young visionary farmer named Alkis Downward and his fiancee who have been tilling the Downward family land for five years and have created a successful and sustainable agriculture production facility.

programme.title: Inside America's National Parks
programme.desc: Grand Teton National Park is a geological wonder, a hiker's paradise, and an irresistible lure for thrill seekers and wildlife enthusiasts. Climb a sheer cliff wall, raft a raging river, visit an avalanche lab, join a search and rescue team, work a dude ranch, and rough it at posh retreats.

programme.title: Outside: Beyond the Lens
programme.desc: Death Valley is the hottest, driest, and lowest location in the United States. Its elemental beauty offers visitors a truly unique experience. When a rare winter storm appears, the valley is transformed into a photographer's dream.
